    json.dump\({''status'': data.get\(''status''\), ''product'': data.get\(''result'', {}\).get\(''product''\), ''candidates_count'': len\(data.get\(''candidates'', []\)\)}, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)

Bash("C:\\Users\\pengveloper\\.conda\\envs\\daiso-search\\python.exe" -c "
import requests, time, json

audio_files = [
    ''C:/Users/pengveloper/daiso-category-search/poc/temp_input.wav'',
]

results = []
for f in audio_files:
    t0 = time.time\(\)
    with open\(f, ''rb''\) as af:
        r = requests.post\(''http://localhost:8000/search/audio'', files={''file'': \(''test.wav'', af, ''audio/wav''\)}\)
    elapsed = time.time\(\) - t0
    data = r.json\(\)
    stt_text = data.get\(''query'', ''N/A''\)
    status = data.get\(''status'', ''error''\)
    product = data.get\(''result'', {}\).get\(''product'', ''N/A''\) if status == ''success'' else status
    proc_time = data.get\(''processing_time'', 0\)
    steps = data.get\(''steps'', {}\)
    stt_latency = steps.get\(''stt'', {}\).get\(''latency'', 0\)

    results.append\({
        ''file'': f.split\(''/''\)[-1],
        ''e2e_latency'': round\(elapsed, 2\),
        ''server_processing'': round\(proc_time, 2\),
        ''stt_latency'': round\(stt_latency, 2\),
        ''stt_text'': stt_text,
        ''status'': status,
        ''result'': product
    }\)

with open\(''C:/Users/pengveloper/daiso-category-search/latency_audio.json'', ''w'', encoding=''utf-8''\) as f:
    json.dump\(results, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)
print\(''done''\)
")
